Name: Marlborough School
Tagline: Marlborough—a middle and high school for girls—helps your daughter discover who they are, grow academically & lead lives of purpose. Start your journey.
About: We don’t just meet the current moment, we endeavor to anticipate the next one."Jennifer Ciccarelli, Head of School As Marlborough’s ninth Head of School, Jennifer Ciccarelli leads with clarity, purpose, and an unwavering belief in the power of girls’ education. She is committed to creating the conditions in which Learning Sparks Purpose—and where every student feels seen, heard, and empowered to lead.
Philosophy: As Marlborough’s ninth Head of School, Jennifer Ciccarelli leads with clarity, purpose, and an unwavering belief in the power of girls’ education.
Outcomes: Marlborough School graduates are consistently accepted into top-tier universities such as Stanford, Harvard, and UCLA. Students also receive numerous accolades in academics, arts, and athletics, reflecting their well-rounded education and leadership skills.
Admissions: From Social Justice Capstone Projects to Mustang Athletics, Chamber Choir to Robotics and Fabrication, Debate to Post-Apocalyptic Literature—these aren’t just programs, they’re the settings where you’ll write your most meaningful chapters. Inquire today and we’ll invite you and your family to experience Marlborough throughout this year’s admissions season—at our Open House, Parent Coffees, Parent and Guardian Education Series, Student/Faculty/Alumnae Panels, and more.
Quote: Students engage in vibrant, collaborative learning environments that foster critical thinking and lively discussions.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Marlborough School's faculty includes experts with advanced degrees and certifications in their fields, ensuring high-quality education. Teachers are experienced in specialized areas such as STEM, humanities, and arts, fostering diverse learning experiences.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The school offers comprehensive counseling services and a robust advisory program to support student wellbeing. Regular community-building events and initiatives promote a nurturing and inclusive environment for all students.
Performance.Academic Integration: Marlborough's curriculum includes innovative courses like Post-Apocalyptic Literature and Robotics, encouraging interdisciplinary learning. The school emphasizes critical thinking and problem-solving through experiential and project-based teaching methods.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates frequently attend prestigious universities, including Stanford and Harvard, showcasing Marlborough's strong academic foundation. Students excel in national competitions, reflecting their preparedness for diverse career paths.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The campus features state-of-the-art facilities, including a robotics lab, a theater, and a swimming pool. These resources support a wide range of extracurricular activities and enhance the educational experience.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Marlborough School utilizes detailed progress reports and regular parent-teacher conferences to ensure student success. Continuous assessment and feedback loops help monitor and support student development effectively.
